name: Hospital Mater Dei S.A.
summary: Hospital Mater Dei S.A. provides health services in Brazil. The company offers hospital, outpatient, laboratory, hospitality, diagnosis, oncology, and other services. It operates 3 hospital units, including 2 hospital units located in the city of Belo Horizonte and 1 hospital unit located on the border between Betim and Contagem. The company was incorporated in 1971 and is based in Belo Horizonte, Brazil.
